description: Goal: make the new partition-key model documented, observable, and mechanically protected from old-world regressions. Signal: .agent docs and relevant guides describe ActivationKey as identity partition, ActivationInputs as evidence, Return/Call facts as evidence movement, and partition policy as the source of finite semantic frontiers; grep-level checks prove discarded concepts are gone. Strategy: update semantic-fixpoint, type-specialization, fact-engine, telemetry, and northstar-facing docs only after code/tests prove the model; add deletion checks for convergence_class, recursive-only key widening, ActivationKey-as-body-input wording, raw closure-capture key defaults, missing-return-as-none, unresolved-as-any, and full telemetry payload budget leaks. Outro: no stale docs that describe the pre-partition model, no scaffolding or temporary fixtures from construction, and no hidden compatibility shim preserving old key semantics.
title: Compiler2 activation partitioning closeout: docs and deletion contract
